ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Choose between 3 modes to use the Day Planner plugin:
ast.target: 选择以下三种模式之一来使用 Day Planner 插件：

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每日笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每年笔记设置！

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] derived_inert
%cReading a derived belonging to a now-destroyed effect may result in stale values
https://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert
ast.target: %c[svelte] derived_inert\n%c读取属于已销毁效果的派生值可能导致陈旧值\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/derived_inert

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] lifecycle_double_unmount
%cTried to unmount a component that was not mounted
https://svelte.dev/e/lifecycle_double_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount
%cTried to unmount a state proxy, rather than a component
https://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount
ast.target: %c[svelte] state_proxy_unmount\n%c尝试卸载状态代理，而不是组件\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/state_proxy_unmount

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
%c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop
%cA `<svelte:boundary>` `reset` function only resets the boundary the first time it is called
https://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop
ast.target: %c[svelte] svelte_boundary_reset_noop\n%c`<svelte:boundary>` 的 `reset` 函数仅在首次调用时重置边界\nhttps://svelte.dev/e/svelte_boundary_reset_noop

ast.name: body
ast.source: Switch to Command mode in settings to use this command
ast.target: 在设置中切换到命令模式以使用此命令

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The folder where planner files will be automatically created when in file mode.
ast.target: 在文件模式下，计划器文件将自动创建到此文件夹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically mark checkboxes for tasks and breaks in the past as complete.
ast.target: 自动将过去已完成的任务和休息时间的复选框标记为完成。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display a notification when a new task is started.
ast.target: 当新任务开始时显示通知。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Hour when a new day begins (0–23). Tasks before this hour are attributed to the previous day.
ast.target: 新一天开始的小时（0–23）。此小时之前的任务将归属于前一天。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use this heading text to mark the beginning of the planner.
ast.target: 使用此标题文本来标记计划器的开始。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use this label to mark a break between tasks.
ast.target: 使用此标签标记任务之间的休息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Use this label to mark the end of all tasks.
ast.target: 使用此标签标记所有任务的结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Replace break and end task text in your planner with the configured label text.
ast.target: 用配置的标签文本替换计划器中的休息和结束任务文本。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Preserve these values in the schedule, for example '-' for canceled, or '>' for rescheduled.
ast.target: 在日程表中保留这些值，例如用'-'表示已取消，用'>'表示已重新安排。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display a circular progress bar in the status bar.
ast.target: 在状态栏中显示一个环形进度条。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Display now and next tasks in the status bar.
ast.target: 在状态栏中显示当前和下一个任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The zoom level to display the timeline. The higher the number, the more vertical space each task will take up.
ast.target: 显示时间线的缩放级别。数字越大，每个任务占用的垂直空间就越多。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Automatically resume timeline scrolling after manual scroll interaction stops.
ast.target: 在手动滚动交互停止后，自动恢复时间线滚动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Auto-resume timeline scrolling after manual interaction stops (1000–10000 ms).
ast.target: 在手动交互停止后自动恢复时间线滚动（1000–10000 毫秒）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Hide tasks with these values from the timeline view; for example '-' for canceled, or '>' for rescheduled.
ast.target: 在时间线视图中隐藏具有这些值的任务；例如用'-'表示已取消，用'>'表示已重新安排。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Timeline pane icon; reopen timeline pane or restart Obsidian to see the change.
ast.target: 时间线窗格图标；重新打开时间线窗格或重启 Obsidian 以查看更改。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Color of the current-time line in the timeline.
ast.target: 时间线中当前时间线的颜色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Start color of the timeline task gradient.
ast.target: 时间线任务渐变的起始颜色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: End color of the timeline task gradient.
ast.target: 时间线任务渐变的结束颜色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Start color of the timeline task gradient on hover.
ast.target: 悬停时时间线任务渐变的起始颜色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: End color of the timeline task gradient on hover.
ast.target: 悬停时时间线任务渐变的结束颜色。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Restore all timeline colors to their defaults.
ast.target: 将所有时间线颜色恢复为默认值。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 一致的休息和结束标签

ast.name: name
ast.source: Link today's planner to the current note
ast.target: 将今天的计划器链接到当前笔记

ast.name: name
ast.source: Unlink today's planner from its note
ast.target: 将今天的计划器从其笔记中取消链接

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将当前设备设置为写入器

ast.name: text
ast.target: README 中的更多详细信息
